column1: # Curated raw_category -> OSM spec_id mappings for Overture / FSQ records.
# Edit this file, rebuild (cache hits → fast), and external POIs get re-attributed.
#   - raw_category: matched case-insensitively against the FULL category
#                   Whitespace is significant within the value.
#   - spec_id: must match a key=value (or key=value|filter_key=filter_value)
#              that exists in tags_config.py. Use external=other to leave
# Lines starting with `#` and blank lines are ignored.
# Rules in this file beat the regex fallbacks in category_map.py.
# ---- Excluded categories (keep them out of the OSM-style buckets but
# ---- Mappings the user explicitly requested in review of the unmapped TSV ----
